title: Factory Assistant update channel document
description: Shape of a Factory Assistant {stable,beta,dev}.json channel document polled by the Supervisor. ILLUSTRATIVE: the authoritative schema is whatever the pinned Supervisor parses — derive it from the upstream home-assistant/version repo at fork time (Phase 2) and validate against the Supervisor's updater before publishing. See version-service/README.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md §7.

imageRef.description: Container image reference, may contain {machine}/{arch} placeholders the Supervisor expands.

otaUrl.description: HTTPS URL template for the OS RAUC bundle; must keep the {version} (and typically {board}) placeholders.

_comment.description: Free-form note; ignored by the Supervisor.

homeassistant.description: Core versions. 'default' applies to every board unless a board-specific key overrides it.

hassos.description: OS image versions per board id, plus the OTA bundle URL template. Board ids use upstream-compatible names (e.g. generic-x86-64) per AGENTS.md invariant 4.

image.description: Container image name templates pulled from the Factory Assistant registry.
